evals.prompt: Set up OpenRouter so I can use SERP clustering.
evals.expected_output: Should guide user through getting an API key from openrouter.ai/keys, saving it via save_openrouter_key.py, and verifying the connection.
assertions: Checks if OpenRouter is already connected

evals.expected_output: Should activate connect-openrouter skill and walk through step-by-step setup.
